programme.title: The Other Guys
programme.desc: Unlike their heroic counterparts on the force, desk-bound NYPD detectives Gamble and Hoitz garner no headlines as they work day to day. Gamble relishes his job as a paper pusher, but Hoitz is itching to get back on the street and make a name for himself. When a seemingly minor case turns out to be a big deal, the two cops get the opportunity to finally prove to their comrades that they have the right stuff.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: We're the Millers
programme.desc: Small-time pot dealer David learns the hard way that no good deed goes unpunished; trying to help some teens, he is jumped by thugs and loses his cash and stash. Now, David's in big debt to his supplier and to wipe the slate clean, he must go to Mexico to pick up the guy's latest shipment. To accomplish his mission, Dave devises a foolproof plan: He packs a fake family into a huge RV and heads south of the border for a wild weekend that is sure to end with a bang.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Just Go With It
programme.desc: His heart recently broken, plastic surgeon Danny Maccabee (Adam Sandler) pretends to be married so he can enjoy future dates with no strings attached. His web of lies works, but when he meets Palmer (Brooklyn Decker) -- the gal of his dreams -- she resists involvement. Instead of coming clean, Danny enlists Katherine (Jennifer Aniston), his assistant, to pose as his soon-to-be-ex-wife. Instead of solving Danny's problems, the lies create more trouble.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: The Other Guys
programme.desc: Unlike their heroic counterparts on the force, desk-bound NYPD detectives Gamble and Hoitz garner no headlines as they work day to day. Gamble relishes his job as a paper pusher, but Hoitz is itching to get back on the street and make a name for himself. When a seemingly minor case turns out to be a big deal, the two cops get the opportunity to finally prove to their comrades that they have the right stuff.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to Gilbert, Ariz., to help an owner who has dedicated her life to a bar with a dangerously dirty kitchen and an untrained bar staff.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon Taffer's discovery of a used condom at a rundown Florida tiki bar redefines owner neglect.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon pins his hopes for a failing dive bar in Orange, Calif., on the owner's daughter.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Bar expert Jon Taffer sets off to help Bill, the owner of The Chicken Bone, avoid financial ruin; Bill, a former customer who took over the Bone, learned the hard way that running a bar is much tougher than it looks.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon has to get the owners of a bar known for serving minors to give up their frat-boy ways.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon goes to work on a bar in the deep south run by a family from New York who make the waitresses dress provocatively and have a menu of sixty items, only five of which sell.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A bar run by two burned-out rockers is failing.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The resistant owner of a dive bar refuses to give up on his punk music obsession to obtain greater financial success.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A castle-shaped bar with an owner who has anger management issues and is pushing staff to their breaking points.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.sub-title: All Twerk and No Pay Makes Taffer Shut It Down
programme.desc: An owner twerks her way to tears when her bar gets out of step.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: After losing her military-veteran father, an overworked woman needs her son to step up and fill the void left by her former right-hand man.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: After gambling his life savings on a run down Las Vegas bar, a desperate owner tries out a fetish night to whip up new business.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A couple on the verge of bankruptcy battle their stubborn, lazy son before he sinks the family business.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.sub-title: Fear and Molding on Pineapple Hill
programme.desc: Jon tries to help an owner who is unable to take control of her own bar or her explosive chef due to her crippling fear of failure and change.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must teach a former engineer and his staff how to properly run a nightclub before they close down for good.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon Taffer attempts to rescue a bar in Tucson, Arizona whose owner has let the bar fall into disrepair despite the efforts of her skilled staff.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to Fountain Hills, Ariz., to help a married couple protect their investment in a bar that is being run into the ground by their friend and business partner.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon Taffer attempts to rescue a bar in Kingwood, Texas, whose owners have neglected both the business and the staff over the last several years.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In Murfreesboro, Tennessee, Jon Taffer must save a bar from failure. The problem stems from the owner's choice to have her boyfriend, a man with absolutely no professional skills or prior experience, manage the entire business operation.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon Taffer heads to DeBary, Florida to rescue a VFW post that is losing members and suffering a financial crisis due to confusion surrounding the leadership of the bar. He must not only rescue the post but also help them establish proper management.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In Ashland City, Tennessee, Jon Taffer confronts a defiant owner who literally sits on a stool while his family's bar crumbles around him. With the business on the brink, Taffer must inspire this idle owner to stand up and fight.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon Taffer sends Phil Wills and Danny Trejo to Houston, Texas, to rescue a business whose owner prefers to drink in the bar while his retired wife has to pick up the pieces.

programme.desc: Jon must help a businessman who bought a bar attached to a bowling alley but had never stepped foot in a bar.
